summary.lv: Epson Europe BV (Seiko Epson Corporation Eiropas filiāle, Japānas globāls tehnoloģiju zīmols) meklē People Technology Operations Specialist Rīgas birojam, kas atbalstīs HR sistēmu un personāla tehnoloģiju operācijas hibrīda režīmā.
summary.en: Epson Europe BV — the European arm of Japan's Seiko Epson Corporation — is hiring a People Technology Operations Specialist for its Riga office to support HR systems and people-tech operations in a hybrid setup.
